title: rubus hastiformis
intro: Rubus hastiformis, also known as the dwarf raspberry or Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus hastiformis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, and can also be consumed as a juice or added to salads and desserts.
